metadata.provenance: Original Ruhroh bundled scenario authored for stateful sprint-planning workflow evaluation.
metadata.networkRationale: Allows package installation for a Vite app.
metadata.contaminationNotes: Original product-workflow task with no canonical public solution.

scenarioContext: This is a scaffolded Vite local app-development task.
The benchmark value is the product workflow and local state behavior, not a prescribed file layout.
The user explicitly asked the run-agent to build and check the core workflow.
goalRubric: The final app is a Vite app that can be installed and run locally by a reviewer.
The app includes planning board, capacity, and risks/decisions views or equivalent user-visible areas.
Tasks can be added, edited, moved between statuses, filtered, and counted in sprint totals.
Risks or decisions can be added and reviewed.
Sprint data persists locally and can be exported as JSON and imported back.
The implementation is not an untouched starter template.
evidenceGuidance: Run build/start commands in the eval workspace when practical.
Explore the app workflow as a user: task creation, movement, filtering, risk/decision entry, export/import, and totals.
Use source inspection only to understand behavior when browser exploration is unavailable or incomplete.

calibrationCases.inputSummary: The Vite app runs locally and includes planning board, capacity, risks or decisions, task creation/edit/movement/filtering, sprint totals, local persistence, and JSON export/import.
calibrationCases.rationale: The delivered app satisfies the complete sprint planning workflow with local state and portability.

calibrationCases.inputSummary: The workspace is still mostly the Vite starter template with no planning board, capacity, risks, decisions, or persistence workflow.
calibrationCases.rationale: An untouched or lightly renamed starter template does not deliver the requested sprint planner.

calibrationCases.inputSummary: The app has a usable planning board with editable tasks and status movement, but capacity, risks/decisions, persistence, or export/import are incomplete.
calibrationCases.rationale: The core board may be useful, but missing adjacent planning and portability requirements should trigger review before scoring.
